name: Lady Zhen

skills.name: Frozen Touch
skills.description: Dealing damage to an enemy with skills 3 times within a short period of time will deal extra damage and freeze them.

skills.name: Ocean of Tears
skills.description: Conjures icicles that block heroes, damaging and launching enemies within range. If Lady Zhen is near the icicles when conjured, she becomes frozen and invincible. The icicles shatter when the skill ends or is canceled, dealing damage (damage is doubled at the center).

skills.name: Flowing Sigh
skills.description: Unleashes a water orb that deals damage.

skills.name: Destructive Deluge
skills.description: Unleashes a water spirit that forms a pool. The pool deals damage to enemies within range and slows them.

skillsZh.name: 凝淚成冰
skillsZh.description: 甄姬短時間內對敵人造成三次技能傷害後，額外造成傷害和冰凍。

skillsZh.name: 淚如泉湧
skillsZh.description: 甄姬召喚地形阻攔英雄單位通行並對指定區域敵人造成傷害和擊飛。若產生冰柱時甄姬在範圍內，則會被冰封處於無敵狀態，當主動解除或時間結束後，冰柱崩裂對周圍敵人造成法術傷害，爆炸中心傷害翻倍。

skillsZh.name: 嘆息水流
skillsZh.description: 甄姬發出彈射水流，對敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 洛神降臨
skillsZh.description: 甄姬施放水流形成水域，對指定範圍敵人造成傷害和減速。

tips: Lady Zhen (Mage): Tier A — 51.16% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Sage's Tome.
tipsZh: 甄姬（中路）：梯度 A，勝率 51.16%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：迴響之杖、祕法之靴、賢者天書.

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 2's bounces, reduced Skill 1 CD
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen's bounce attacks perform well during small team fights in the early to mid game. To better pace her power level and make it last until the late game, we've changed the number of bounces her Skill 2 has. We've also reduced the cooldown of her Skill 1 to give her more opportunities to freeze enemies and protect herself in the early game.

patchHistory.change: Reduced mid to late game damage and lowered the slow effect of Ultimate during the early and mid game.
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen has strong area crowd control and continuous poking capabilities. Her Skill 1 also enhances survivability. We are slightly reducing her damage output and crowd control to allow other heroes to better compete against her.

patchHistory.change: Slightly improved laning in the early game, but weakened poking in the late game.
patchHistory.detail: Lady Zhen is a mage with exceptional damage and crowd control. In the current version of the game, she is clearly a bit too powerful. We hope to reduce Lady Zhen's domination in the mid to late game and, while lowering her damage and poke ability in the late game, adequately supplement her lane clearing in the early game.

patchHistoryZh.change: 調整2技能彈射次數，降低1技能冷卻
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「甄姬的彈射在前中期小規模團戰中有不錯的表現，我們調整了2技能的彈射次數，略微延緩她發威的時間，並保證她在後期能維持好表現；同時我們降低1技能前期的冷卻時間，讓她有更多嘗試冰凍敵人以及自保的機會。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低中後期傷害，降低大招前中期的減速效果
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「甄姬擁有強大的團控能力和持續消耗能力，同時1技能也可以提升生存能力，我們些微削弱了輸出和控制，使其他英雄能夠與她抗衡。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 略微增強前期清線能力，削弱後期消耗能力
patchHistoryZh.detail: 甄姬是一名傷害能力和控制能力都非常出色的法師，在目前版本的遊戲中，她顯得有些過於強大了。我們希望降低甄姬在遊戲中後期的統治地位，削弱她後期傷害和消耗能力，同時適度補充她前期的清線能力。

faqs.question: Is Lady Zhen good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lady Zhen is Tier A Mage with 51.16% win rate, 1.04% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lady Zhen build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Sage's Tome, Savant's Wrath, Insatiable Tome, Void Staff.

faqs.question: How to counter Lady Zhen?
faqs.answer: Pick Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna. Strong into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi.

faqsZh.question: 甄姬 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 甄姬 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.16%、選取 1.04%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 甄姬 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：迴響之杖、祕法之靴、賢者天書、博學者之怒、噬神之書、虛無法杖.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 甄姬？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Charlotte、Liu Bei、Luna。甄姬 克制 Cirrus、Nakoruru、Sima Yi。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi. Weak into: Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna.

guide.overview: Lady Zhen is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.4% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Lady Zhen: Places marks on enemies when hitting them with skills, for up to 3 stacks.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Mask of Agony, Boots of Tranquility, Twilight Stream, then complete Augur's Word, Frozen Breath, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Lady Zhen's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Ocean of Tears → Flowing Sigh → Destructive Deluge → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Destructive Deluge (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Ocean of Tears, and Destructive Deluge on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Ocean of Tears → Flowing Sigh → Destructive Deluge → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Lady Zhen is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Lady Zhen.
comparisons: Lady Zhen vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Lady Zhen has +0.3% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Lady Zhen when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Lady Zhen vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.4% more often globally. Choose Lady Zhen when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Lady Zhen excels into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi. Avoid blind picking into Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna without team peel.
